text.p: I' ve been shortlisted for interview at , and the interview comes up on the 26th November,2008.Please Sir, I would need clues on how they conduct their interview- their areas of concentration and expectations.
How is everybody, Sir?My regards to mummy, , and ,i.I have not forgotten the text messages. I have just completed my assigments. I will certainly gather them for you, Sir.I have you in mind.

I'm now on chapter 2 of my thesis. My formA has been approved for PG college's scrutiny, but the chairman post graduate has refused to sign it for me; he's insisting that i submit the form to him myself.
All the same, I'm still among the students that are in the front In their work.
